Title: Duplicate invoice submission accepted
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Login as vendor; 2. Submit invoice with number INV-100; 3. Submit again with same number INV-100
Expected Result: System rejects duplicate submission with appropriate error
Actual Result: Duplicate accepted as new record; AP queue shows two identical entries

Title: Rejected invoice still moves to payment
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Login as AP; 2. Reject submitted invoice with reason; 3. Trigger payment scheduler
Expected Result: Rejected invoice is excluded from payment queue
Actual Result: Rejected invoice appears in payment queue and is paid out

Title: Cross-vendor invoice access
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Login as Vendor A; 2. Capture URL to own invoice; 3. Replace id with Vendor B's invoice id
Actual Result: Vendor B's invoice details are returned to Vendor A

Title: Email not sent on rejection
Steps to Reproduce: 1. AP rejects invoice with reason; 2. Wait 5 minutes; 3. Check vendor mailbox
Expected Result: Vendor receives rejection email with reason within SLA
Actual Result: No email is delivered; no entry in mail-out log

Title: Invoice amount accepts negative values
Actual Result: Invoice is created with negative amount and shown in AP queue

Title: Session not invalidated on logout
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Login; 2. Capture session token; 3. Logout; 4. Replay token via API

Title: Monthly report total differs from DB
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Generate April 2026 report; 2. Compare APPROVED count with SELECT count(*) FROM invoices WHERE status='APPROVED' AND month='2026-04'
Actual Result: Report shows 142; DB shows 138 (4 soft-deleted rows incorrectly included)

Title: Concurrent approval creates inconsistent state
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open same invoice as two AP users; 2. AP-1 approves; 3. AP-2 rejects within 1 second
Expected Result: Second action is rejected with conflict; status reflects first action only
Actual Result: Both actions succeed; status flips to last write; audit log shows both

Title: File upload accepts .exe disguised as .pdf
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Rename test.exe to test.pdf; 2. Upload as invoice attachment
Expected Result: Server detects mime-type mismatch and rejects

Title: Password reset link does not expire
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Request reset link; 2. Wait 48 hours; 3. Use link
Expected Result: Link is single-use and expires within configured TTL (e.g. 30 min)
Actual Result: Link still works after 48 hours and can be reused multiple times
